2232030.name: The Ultimate Couch Game
2232030.description: A simple funny 2D couch game to play with up to 9 friends! Players will compete with their friends online in minigames where the last one to survive wins, these involve surviving lasers, racing against each other in obstacles and avoiding falling platforms. When a player wins a minigame they will have an opportunity to roll a dice and move their piece on the board forward, but be careful as there are some bad tiles that can be landed on and arm your chances of winning! Enjoy competing to reach the end of the board first through winning minigames whilst sabotaging your friends to increase your odds! Once one player reaches the end the game is over and they win! Best played with many friends for a good time!
2232030.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
